Start your mindfulness journey with these easy techniques.

body { margin: 0; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; background: #f5f7f6; } .container { display: flex; } /* Sidebar */ .sidebar { width: 220px; background: #ffffff; padding: 20px; border-right: 1px solid #ddd; height: 100vh; } .sidebar h2 { color: #2e7d32; } .sidebar ul { list-style: none; padding: 0; } .sidebar li { padding: 10px 0; cursor: pointer; color: #555; } .sidebar .active { color: #2e7d32; font-weight: bold; } /* Content */ .content { padding: 40px; flex: 1; } .content h1 { color: #2e7d32; } .subtitle { color: #666; margin-bottom: 30px; } /* Blog Cards */ .blog-grid { display: flex; gap: 20px; } .card { background: white; padding: 20px; border-radius: 10px; flex: 1; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); } .card h3 { color: #333; } .card p { color: #666; } .card button { margin-top: 10px; padding: 10px; border: none; background: #2e7d32; color: white; border-radius: 5px; cursor: pointer; }
